mapper.select: SELECT id, object_type as objectType, to_object_type as toObjectType, criteria_str as criteriaStr FROM baseapp_projection ORDER BY object_type, to_object_type
SELECT id, object_type as objectType, to_object_type as toObjectType, criteria_str as criteriaStr FROM baseapp_projection WHERE object_type = #{objectType} ORDER BY to_object_type
SELECT id, object_type as objectType, to_object_type as toObjectType, criteria_str as criteriaStr FROM baseapp_projection WHERE to_object_type = #{toObjectType} ORDER BY object_type
SELECT DISTINCT object_type FROM baseapp_projection UNION SELECT DISTINCT to_object_type FROM baseapp_projection ORDER BY 1

SELECT pfm.id, pfm.object_field as objectField, pfm.to_object_field as toObjectField, pfm.expr, pfm.field_mapping_type_id as fieldMappingTypeId FROM baseapp_projection_field_mapping pfm WHERE pfm.id = #{projectionId} ORDER BY pfm.to_object_field

SELECT pc.id, pc.object_type as objectType, pc.to_object_type as toObjectType, pc.criteria_str as criteriaStr, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM baseapp_projection_child_field_mapping pcfm WHERE pcfm.id = pc.id) as fieldCount FROM baseapp_projection_child pc ORDER BY pc.object_type

SELECT id, object_field as objectField, to_object_field as toObjectField, expr, field_mapping_type_id as fieldMappingTypeId FROM baseapp_projection_child_field_mapping WHERE id = #{childId} ORDER BY to_object_field

SELECT p.id as projectionId, p.object_type as objectType, p.to_object_type as toObjectType, pfm.object_field as objectField, pfm.to_object_field as toObjectField, pfm.expr, 'main' as level FROM baseapp_projection p JOIN baseapp_projection_field_mapping pfm ON pfm.id = p.id WHERE pfm.object_field LIKE CONCAT('%', #{field}, '%') OR pfm.to_object_field LIKE CONCAT('%', #{field}, '%') OR pfm.expr LIKE CONCAT('%', #{field}, '%') ORDER BY p.object_type, p.to_object_type

SELECT p.id as projectionId, p.object_type as objectType, p.to_object_type as toObjectType, pc.object_type as childObjectType, pc.to_object_type as childToObjectType, pcfm.object_field as objectField, pcfm.to_object_field as toObjectField, pcfm.expr, 'child' as level FROM baseapp_projection p CROSS JOIN baseapp_projection_child pc JOIN baseapp_projection_child_field_mapping pcfm ON pcfm.id = pc.id WHERE (pcfm.object_field LIKE CONCAT('%', #{field}, '%') OR pcfm.to_object_field LIKE CONCAT('%', #{field}, '%') OR pcfm.expr LIKE CONCAT('%', #{field}, '%')) ORDER BY p.object_type, p.to_object_type
